description: The UI transitions from a summary view to the passenger details input form.
frame_description: The screen updates to show form fields for passenger name and date of birth.

description: User pauses to read the 'Heads up!' warning and examine the passenger details form fields.
frame_description: The passenger details form is visible with a warning message at the top.

description: User scrolls down the page to reveal additional form sections for rewards and contact information.
frame_description: The view shifts downward, bringing the phone number and email fields into view.
